docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, MEGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, LORENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHAN, MEGAN PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW RENT OVERPAYMENT SINCE LEASE OBLIGATED $1.5K/MO., WHICH WAS UNTIMELY AND SOMETIMES UNPAID.
